name: garelier
description: Garelier — multi-agent software-engineering framework (roles, lanes, gates; works with Claude Code and Codex CLI). Independent community project; not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI.

plugins.name: garelier
plugins.description: Role-based local project coordination with PM-guided workflows, knowledge governance, and review gates. Entry: control-project / control-library / PM; the PM decides the lane in dialogue.
